descriptions: Expand the 'strategy' domain keywords to include more common variations for Founder's Office and Chief of Staff roles, addressing the low FO/CoS approval rate. This will allow more relevant jobs to be ingested and classified correctly.
Expand the 'pm' domain keywords to include more common variations and ensure better coverage for Product Manager roles, addressing the low PM board count. This will help ingest more relevant PM jobs.

Refine the `DIRTY_COMPANY_PATTERNS` to be less aggressive. 'founding team' and 'founding member' are legitimate parts of company names in some contexts, and removing them from the dirty patterns will prevent false positives and allow more companies to be correctly identified.
